name: Zehra Koçer
title: Dr
bio: Consultant gynaecologist at MediWell Clinic in Tottenham, trained at Zeynep Kamil Women and Children's Research Hospital in Istanbul. Specialises in menopause, infertility and menstrual irregularities, offering faster access than typical NHS waiting times.

name: Esra Caglar
title: Dr
bio: Consultant Child and Adolescent Psychiatrist and Adult Psychoanalyst with over 15 years of experience, based on Queen Anne Street. Assesses and treats anxiety, mood difficulties, trauma, neurodevelopmental conditions (ADHD, autism), and family and parenting concerns using a psychoanalytic, patient-centred approach.

name: Taylan Yükselen
title: Dr
bio: Consultant psychiatrist offering private care through Imperial College Healthcare, recommended within London's Turkish-speaking community for psychiatric consultation.

name: Meltem Özkan Girgin
title: Dr
bio: Doctor recommended within North London's Turkish-speaking community, associated with MediWell Clinic in Tottenham and Medi-Park Clinic in Haringey (the two may reflect the same practitioner working across sites, or two different doctors sharing a first name — this could not be fully disambiguated from available sources). Repeatedly praised for obstetric follow-up and pregnancy support.

name: Haydar Bolat
title: Dr
bio: Co-founder and Medical Director of My Health & Wellbeing Clinic in Whitechapel. UK-registered doctor with over a decade of NHS experience in family medicine, urgent care and A&E. Trained at Barts and The London School of Medicine and Dentistry (graduating with distinction) and gained MRCGP in 2016.

name: Fatma Seda Soylu
title: Dr
bio: Obstetrician and gynaecologist with over 25 years of experience, having worked as a consultant in hospitals across Turkey before relocating to the UK in 2019 and gaining GMC registration. Practices at My Health & Wellbeing Clinic in Whitechapel.

name: Ömer Geçici
title: Prof Dr
bio: Consultant psychiatrist at Psikolog Londra Terapi Platformu on Bishopsgate, offering ADHD and autism spectrum assessment and psychiatric consultation without an NHS waiting list.

name: Kenan Deniz
title: Mr
bio: Consultant Neurosurgeon at Leeds General Infirmary specialising in spine, neurovascular and skull base surgery (the community's WhatsApp group referred to him as a "neurologist", but he is in fact a neurosurgeon). Also sees private patients at Nuffield Health Leeds, Spire Methley Park and The Duchy Hospital, Harrogate. Recommended for paediatric epilepsy and neurology referrals.

name: Tushar Agarwal
title: Mr
bio: Consultant colorectal and general surgeon specialising in laparoscopic colorectal surgery, colorectal cancers and proctology (surgery for haemorrhoids, anal fissures and anal fistulae). Practices privately at The London Clinic and on the NHS at St Mark's Hospital (The National Bowel Hospital). Honorary Senior Lecturer at Imperial College London.

name: Anwar Khan
title: Mr
bio: Surgeon specialising in circumcision for infants, children and adults, having performed over 25,000 procedures. Works part-time in a surgical subspecialty at Grange University Hospital, Cwmbran, Wales, alongside his private Circumcision Clinic London in Surbiton.
